description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge extending to the left. The sofa is upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, giving it a contemporary and urban appearance. It features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are loose and uniform in size. Four accent pillows, two in dark gray and two in white, are arranged symmetrically along the backrest for added comfort and visual contrast. The armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, matching the sofa's upholstery. The base of the sofa is solid and boxy, with the legs either recessed or hidden from view, contributing to a streamlined silhouette suitable for urban interiors or outdoor lounge areas.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in gray fabric with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and four accent pillows in dark gray and white. The design is sleek and contemporary, with a solid base and subtle woven texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and four accent pillows arranged symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the straight, padded armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the sofa's back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the chaise lounge and the right armrest, with accent pillows visible along the back.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size, with four accent pillows (two dark gray, two white) symmetrically placed along the back.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of medium height, matching the sofa upholstery, with a boxy and streamlined profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden block-style base that gives the sofa a grounded, solid appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height with three loose, uniform backrest cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid medium-gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
